scripts.build:mcp: mkdir -p bin && docker run --rm -e HOME=/tmp -v $(pwd)/mcp:/src -v $(pwd)/bin:/out -w /src golang:1.24-alpine sh -c "GOOS=linux   GOARCH=amd64 go build -trimpath -ldflags='-s -w' -o /out/$npm_package_name-mcp-$npm_package_version-linux-amd64   ./cmd/mcp && GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -trimpath -ldflags='-s -w' -o /out/$npm_package_name-mcp-$npm_package_version-windows-amd64.exe ./cmd/mcp && GOOS=darwin  GOARCH=amd64 go build -trimpath -ldflags='-s -w' -o /out/$npm_package_name-mcp-$npm_package_version-darwin-amd64   ./cmd/mcp && GOOS=darwin  GOARCH=arm64 go build -trimpath -ldflags='-s -w' -o /out/$npm_package_name-mcp-$npm_package_version-darwin-arm64   ./cmd/mcp && GOOS=linux   GOARCH=amd64 go build -trimpath -ldflags='-s -w' -o /out/$npm_package_name-server-$npm_package_version ./cmd/server && echo done"
